## 1. Executive Summary
- **Statistics:** 0 completed, 1 pending.
- **Key Achievements:** N/A.
- **Risks:** High risk of service interruption due to pending SSL certificate renewal (Expiration: 04-05).

## 2. Pending & Risks
| Date | Pending Task | Requester | Assignee | Status |
|:---:|:---|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| 03-25 | Certificate renewal (Exp. 04-05) | Minjun Lee (Int) | David Kim (Ext) | Critical Delay / No Response |

## 3. Management Gap
- **[Target] David Kim (External)**: Unresponsive after two follow-up attempts. High risk of certificate expiration on April 5th. Immediate escalation to vendor management or alternative procurement is required.

## 4. Strategic Insights
- **Proactive Renewal Cycles:** Critical infrastructure components like SSL certificates require earlier initiation or automated management to mitigate risks associated with external vendor delays.
- **Vendor SLA Review:** Evaluate the responsiveness of the current external partner to prevent recurrence of communication gaps during time-sensitive renewals.
